calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: H1/H2 policy-learning discriminator power-fix (PPO + learner-adequacy gate)
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC (claim_ids=[], experiment_purpose=diagnostic, non_contributory -- PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING; brake-exempt). Power-fixed re-run of the H1/H2 policy-learning discriminator; supersedes V3-EXQ-732. Adjudicated by REE_assembly/evidence/planning/failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-732_2026-07-10.{md,json}, which REJECTED 732's H2_observation_interface_unlearnable self-route as UNDER-POWERED (shared 200-ep Monte-Carlo A2C sized for the B1-vs-B2 contrast, not learnability; vanilla B2 was the best arm and partially foraged). Four power-fixes: (1) PPO minibatched off-policy learner at 2000 ep (~10x env-step, ~30x update budget) on BOTH B1 and B2; (2) entropy 0.03 + count-based novelty; (3) explicit forage-bonus + running-std reward scaling + advantage normalization (P2 greedy DV mean_resources_per_episode stays unshaped); (4) L0 learner-adequacy gate -- vanilla PPO on a plain sanity env vs its oracle must clear >=50% before any sub-floor B2 reads as H2 (else substrate_not_ready_requeue). Grid: B2 clears -> H1 action/policy substrate build; B2 sub-floor WITH adequacy gate passed -> H2 observation-encoding build. NO observation-encoding substrate build until this run confirms H2. Feeds WS-1 in ree_ai_design_critique_plan.md. Queue-race hazard: verify post-commit that the entry landed (phase3-queue snapshot race).
items.machine_affinity_note: cloud-preferred via scaler; heavy (~8h) CPU PPO x 4 arms x 3 seeds -- keep off the Mac unless idle

items.title: MECH-163 V3 full-completion gate -- VTA/hippocampally-planned arm (rerun, supersedes 495)
items.note: Successor to V3-EXQ-495 which SIGTERMed on ree-cloud-1 after ~4h (undersized CX22 platform restart -- not a code path; no manifest). No design change vs 495 (experiment_type bump + supersedes manifest field only). machine_affinity any: cloud-1 is now the excluded hub and surviving workers carry Phase-3 SIGTERM protection (transient exit codes + HELD_BY_SELF). Smoke-passed against current substrate 2026-07-09 (base full dry-run 137s + letter past-init). Diagnosed via /diagnose-errors.
